nodes.name: 茶色雕
nodes.summary: 茶色雕（Tawny eagle，学名 Aquila rapax），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联15个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括气候变暖、森林砍伐、栖息地破坏等4项。
nodes.shortSummary: 茶色雕（英語：Tawny eagle，学名：Aquila rapax），别称草原鹰、黑鵰、花鵰、塔斯、乌小猊、小花皂雕，为鹰科鵰属的鸟类，分布在非洲和南亚地区。一般生活于草原和山脉。该物种的模式产地在非洲南部。 描述 草原雕长度为60-75厘米，翼展159-190厘米。重量范围…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The African population can be found in three, fairly discrete populations. One of these is found in North Africa in south-central Morocco, possibly northern Algeria, southwestern Mauritania, Senegambia, southern Mali, central and southern Niger eastward through southern Chad, northern and central Sudan to most of Ethiopia and Somalia (but for the northeast and central-east).Isenmann P

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: British Ornithologists' Union. In east Africa and central Africa, the tawny eagle is found in central and eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo and throughout the drier portions of Uganda and in the entire nations of Kenya, Tanzania, Zambia (quite often residing in the Luangwa valley and the Chambeshi drainage), Malawi and Mozambique

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Gabar, 19, 1-22. thumb|A tawny eagle perched in Rajasthan in India. Out of Africa, the species may possibly be found in the southwestern part of the Arabian Peninsula, i.e

links.label: 保护等级
links.evidence: status = VU

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Numerous factors, particularly loss of nesting habitat due to logging and global warming, as well as persecution (largely via poisoning) and other anthropogenic mortality (largely through contact with various manmade objects) are driving the once numerous tawny eagle perhaps to the brink of extinction.{{cite journal |last1=Wichmann |first1=M

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Numerous factors, particularly loss of nesting habitat due to logging and global warming, as well as persecution (largely via poisoning) and other anthropogenic mortality (largely through contact with various manmade objects) are driving the once numerous tawny eagle perhaps to the brink of extinction.{{cite journal |last1=Wichmann |first1=M

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Biological Conservation, 144(2), 746-752. Further threats to tawny eagles include habitat loss and land-use changes such as intensified cattle grazing, firewood collection and sale and the charcoal industry. Such culling of the spare trees of arid India seem to be the primary driver of less understand decline of tawny eagles in India. A seemingly higher instance of bacterial infections also seems to affecting the tawny eagles of India.Dutta, T

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It was found that the projected decline of tawny eagles from climate change, which is already underway, begun via impact population persistence, first effecting population dynamics, the composition of biological communities and finally biodiversity.Wichmann, M
